eyebrow.zh: 本地 · 离线 · 零配置

headline.zh:
在 agent 执行依赖之前
揪出藏在里面的恶意指令
headline.en:
Catch the hidden instructions in your deps
before your coding agent runs them

sub.zh: 一条命令扫描项目与 node_modules，把注释、Markdown、YAML、字符串字面量、MCP 工具描述里瞄准 agent 的祈使指令报出来，命中 HIGH 即非零退出。
sub.en: One command scans your project and node_modules, flags the agent-directed imperatives hidden in comments, Markdown, YAML, string literals and MCP tool descriptions, and exits non-zero on any HIGH.

title.zh: 把 prose 当可执行代码来审

body.zh: 编码 agent 会读 README、注释、依赖文档并照做——那份 prose 就是代码。AgentGuard 遍历项目与 node_modules，把注释、Markdown、YAML、字符串字面量、MCP 工具描述归一化为带类型的文本单元，再逐句审。
body.en: A coding agent reads and acts on READMEs, comments and dependency docs — so that prose is code. AgentGuard walks your project and node_modules and normalizes comments, Markdown, YAML, string literals and MCP tool descriptions into typed text units, then inspects each one.

chips: › 6 类源 → 带类型文本单元

title.zh: 祈使动词 × agent 收件人 叉积判定

body.zh: 检测不是关键词匹配：一个祈使动词（delete / curl /「ignore previous instructions」）只有在同一行对 AI / assistant / agent / model 说话时才升到 HIGH。普通 prose 里的裸「delete」「.env」因缺少收件人被直接丢弃——一份干净的 README 产出零 finding。
body.en: Detection isn't keyword matching: an imperative verb (delete / curl / "ignore previous instructions") escalates to HIGH only when the same line addresses an AI / assistant / agent / model. A bare "delete" or ".env" in ordinary prose is dropped for lack of an addressee — a clean README yields zero findings.

title.zh: 7 类瞄准 agent 的威胁分类

body.zh: 每条命中产出一个 AgentThreat finding——file、line、source_kind、rule_id、severity，以及点名瞄准哪个 agent 收件人的 why。内置签名语料覆盖删除、外传、窃密、指令覆盖、提权、后门、隐蔽七类攻击，可用 --rulesPath 覆盖。
body.en: Every hit is an AgentThreat finding — file, line, source_kind, rule_id, severity, and a why naming the agent it targets. The built-in signature corpus covers destroy, exfiltrate, credential-phish, injection-override, privilege-escalation, persistence and obfuscation, and is overridable via --rulesPath.

title.zh: 直接落进 CI，无需接线

body.zh: 存在 HIGH 即非零退出，scan 直接用作 CI 或 pre-commit 门禁。--ci 输出无 ANSI、日志稳定；--json 机器可读且管道安全，重定向到文件或管道给 jq 时不会被截断。全程本地、离线、确定性，无需 API key。
body.en: Any HIGH means a non-zero exit, so scan works as a CI or pre-commit gate with no extra wiring. --ci is terse, log-stable and ANSI-free; --json is machine-readable and pipe-safe, never truncated when redirected to a file or piped to jq. Fully local, offline and deterministic — no API key.

chips: › --json 管道安全 · 离线确定性

headline.zh: 在 agent 替你跑之前，先扫一遍
headline.en: Scan it before your agent runs it

sub.zh: 开源、MIT、永久免费自托管。零安装、零配置、无需 API key。
sub.en: Open source, MIT, free to self-host forever. Zero install, zero config, no API key.

tag.zh: 面向编码 agent 的依赖 prose 注入扫描器
tag.en: The dependency-prose injection scanner for coding agents
